decisions.decision: Install deterministic replay engine and quality ranker as executable governance gates.
decisions.rationale: Stage 8 can generate improved prompts; Stage 9 must replay and rank candidate patches before writeback/promotion.

decisions.decision: Use weighted score dimensions with required hard gates.

preservation_rules: Do not replace Stage 8 auto-improvement loop; compose with it.
Do not promote a candidate that fails hard gates even if numeric score is high.
